description: As stock of an item sells down, an associate needs to consolidate the remaining units to make the shelf look full (a process called 'facing').

nodes.task_description: Identify a product on the shelf that has gaps or looks depleted.

expected_outcome.value: The associate finds an area that needs merchandising attention.

nodes.task_description: Pull all units of the product to the front of the shelf.

expected_outcome.value: The shelf now looks neat and full.

nodes.task_description: Check the shelf tag to ensure it is accurate and visible.

expected_outcome.value: The product is well-presented and easy for customers to shop.
